decisions.title: Ship Explore V2 (E2) to GA
decisions.context: E2 setting defaults, sync panels + live mode issues, channel data not showing, calc channel value bugs all indicate GA readiness blockers. Need go/no-go by EOW.
decisions.blockedBy: ENG-9716 (sporadic time updates), ENG-9720 (channel data not showing), ENG-7144 (calc channel values identical)

arguments.for: Core navigation swap ready (ENG-9792), legend polish done, terminal progress bar improves UX, timezone persistence adds value. Nail the Core pillar requires shipping.
arguments.against: Critical bugs in sync mode, live mode, and channel display. GA launch with known data integrity issues damages trust and North Star (decisions captured). Need 2 more sprints.

decisions.title: Prioritize DataFusion migration over feature work
decisions.context: ENG-9460 implements DataFusion-based reading for DLv2 parquet. This is foundational for Build the Moat (performance + scale). Competes with E2 GA polish.

arguments.for: Builds technical moat, enables future scale, reduces query latency (improves decision velocity). S3 throttling retry (ENG-9805) and validation (ENG-9806) show infrastructure maturity needed.
arguments.against: E2 GA is customer-facing and urgent. DataFusion can wait until post-GA. Engineering capacity split reduces velocity on both fronts.

decisions.title: Invest in Canvas metadata and documentation integration
decisions.context: ENG-9309 (Canvas metadata), ENG-9499 (link to docs from family page) signal Embed Deeper pillar. Canvas adoption low—need better discoverability and context.

arguments.for: Canvas is strategic (Embed Deeper). Metadata + docs reduce time-to-insight, increase decisions captured. Low-hanging fruit for adoption boost.
arguments.against: Canvas usage metrics don't justify investment over E2 GA or core reliability. Better to wait for clear customer pull signal.

decisions.title: Establish enterprise SSO/SCIM testing framework
decisions.context: ENG-9584 (SSO user linking UX), ENG-8081 (IdP integration for TEC), ENG-9783 (SCIM testing gap) show enterprise auth is fragile. No repro environment = blind deployment.

arguments.for: Enterprise is growth vector. Auth failures block Embed Deeper at scale. Testing framework prevents outages, improves enterprise trust.
arguments.against: Not on critical path for 2026 strategy pillars. Can address reactively when enterprise deals require it. Limited eng capacity.

timeAudit.weekSummary: 55% meeting load—above healthy threshold. 3 one-on-ones suggest reactive management mode. Only 8 focus hours for strategic work.
alerts: No dedicated time blocked for E2 GA decision this week
4 overlapping engineering syncs on Wed—consolidation opportunity
Canvas strategy review pushed 3 times—signal of deprioritization

events.title: E2 GA Go/No-Go Decision
events.description: Review blocker bugs (ENG-9716, ENG-9720, ENG-7144). Decide ship date or extend beta.

events.title: Engineering triage: E2 critical bugs
events.description: Assess fix effort for sync panel, live mode, channel data issues. Assign owners.

events.title: S3 compaction retry PR review
events.description: ENG-9805 merged—reduces throttling incidents, unblocks DataFusion work.

events.title: DataFusion prioritization decision
events.description: Choose: accelerate DataFusion or hold for post-E2 GA. Impacts Q2 moat-building.

events.title: Canvas metadata GA
events.description: ENG-9309 ships. Canvas panels now show provenance, timestamps, ownership. Adoption signal TBD.

events.title: E2 beta extension announcement (if no-go)
events.description: If E2 GA delayed, communicate revised timeline to customers. Risk: momentum loss.

events.title: Enterprise SSO testing framework decision
events.description: Approve investment in SCIM test harness (ENG-9783) or defer to Q3. Impacts enterprise sales velocity.

events.title: Q2 strategy refresh
events.description: Assess pillar progress. Adjust roadmap based on E2 GA outcome, Canvas adoption, DataFusion velocity.

events.title: Sift Edge pilot #6 onboarding
events.description: Sixth pilot customer begins Sift Edge deployment. Moat-building on track.
